message:
refactor(server): consolidate sqlmodel_core::Value import in auth route hardening tests

Add a `use mcp_agent_mail_db::sqlmodel_core::Value` import at the top
of the auth_route_hardening_regression_suite test module, then replace
three occurrences of the fully-qualified `sqlmodel_core::Value::BigInt`
with the shorter `Value::BigInt`. Reduces noise in the test body and
aligns with the import style used in the rest of the test suite.

No behavioral change — purely an import hygiene cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
